item.title: RichCimini: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 10min Jets draft preview: Mini-scouting report of a player who could be under consideration at
item.description:
Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 10min Jets draft preview: Mini-scouting report of a player who could be under consideration at 16:
Makai Lemon, WR, USC (5-11, 192)
All-America. Biletnikoff Award winner.
79 catches, 1,156 yards, 11 TDs in ‘25. Sticky hands: Only one drop in 110 targets.
Not big and not a Mostrar más 2 14 1 mil

item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 12min Excluding the bubble, 10 straight years a home favorite of 3+ pts in gm1 of the playoffs has lost
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 12min Excluding the bubble, 10 straight years a home favorite of 3+ pts in gm1 of the playoffs has lost outright. Last year GS beat HOU as 3 pt dogs (+10). Avg spread has been 6.5 so not small upsets in general. Altho none were upsets of a team favored by DD. Candidates this year would Mostrar más 5 1 1 mil
